overall.description: A first-person perspective of someone walking through a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by a flashlight or headlamp. The footage shows a narrow dirt path surrounded by dense trees and undergrowth, with the camera moving steadily forward through the woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail illuminated by flashlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt path, illuminating the way ahead with a flashlight while navigating through the dark forest

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail with scattered rocks and leaves winding through the trees
tall trees with thick trunks and green foliage lining the left side of the path
dense low vegetation and shrubs on the right side of the trail
single prominent tree trunk visible in the center distance ahead
exposed rocks and stones embedded in the dirt path surface

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt forest path at night, illuminated by an artificial light source. Dense deciduous trees and underbrush line both sides of the trail, creating an enclosed, dark environment. The path surface shows scattered rocks and uneven terrain as the viewer progresses deeper into the woods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a claustrophobic forest trail that deepens into a dense, nocturnal wilderness. It begins by advancing along a narrow dirt path, where an artificial light source cuts through the surrounding darkness to reveal thick deciduous trees. As the camera progresses, the enclosed environment tightens with encroaching underbrush lining both sides of the trail. The scene then shifts focus toward the ground, highlighting scattered rocks and uneven terrain as the viewer pushes further into the woods.
